# Lodestone Warps 0.5.0

## Added

- Added `network_mode` config with `all` and `discover` modes.
- Added per-player Lodestone discovery storage.
- Added automatic discovery when placing or interacting with registered Lodestones.
- Added global Lodestones for lobbies, hubs, and shared spawn networks.
- Added `/warp global <id> <true|false>`.
- Added `/warp discover grant <player> <id>`.
- Added `/warp discover revoke <player> <id>`.
- Added `/warp discover list <player>`.
- Added `lodestone_teleport.global` permission node.

## Changed

- UI vanilla and UI mod now hide undiscovered Lodestones when `network_mode` is set to `discover`.
- Manual `/warp tp <id or name>` now respects discovery visibility.
- Existing Lodestone save data migrates forward with global flags defaulting to `false`.

## Notes

- `network_mode` defaults to `all`, so existing servers keep the same behavior until they opt into discovery mode.
- In discovery mode, players still need `lodestone_teleport.use` when permissions are enabled.
